pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 8 creates directory; setup_task.sh lines 44-53 write three GeoJSON files to this location
export_result.sh line 10 references this path; setup_task.sh line 14 cleans this location before task starts

setup_task.sh line 78 sets expected_crs to EPSG:4326; Natural Earth source data verified to be in CRS84 (OGC notation for WGS 84/EPSG:4326); downloaded from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvkelso/natural-earth-vector/master/geojson/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.geojson and verified to contain crs object: {"type":"name","properties":{"name":"urn:ogc:def:crs:OGC:1.3:CRS84"}} which is equivalent to EPSG:4326
setup_task.sh line 80 creates this file; export_result.sh line 35 references this as gt_path
setup_task.sh line 19 defines NE_URL; downloaded and verified to be valid Natural Earth dataset with 177 total features
Downloaded Natural Earth dataset and filtered for CONTINENT='Europe'; setup_task.sh uses ogr2ogr to filter: -where "CONTINENT = 'Europe'"
Downloaded Natural Earth dataset and filtered for CONTINENT='Africa'; setup_task.sh uses ogr2ogr to filter: -where "CONTINENT = 'Africa'"
Downloaded Natural Earth dataset and filtered for CONTINENT='South America'; setup_task.sh uses ogr2ogr to filter: -where "CONTINENT = 'South America'"
Sum of filtered features: Europe (39) + Africa (51) + South America (13) = 103; verifier.py line 52 expects this combined count with tolerance of ±2
Downloaded Natural Earth dataset contains both Polygon and MultiPolygon geometries; verifier.py line 96 checks for these exact types
Downloaded Natural Earth dataset confirmed to have NAME and CONTINENT properties across all features; verifier.py line 105 checks for these exact attributes
Natural Earth dataset split by ogr2ogr using CONTINENT='Europe', 'Africa', 'South America' filters; verifier.py line 81 requires all 3 regions

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real, public domain data from the Natural Earth vector dataset (nvkelso/natural-earth-vector GitHub repository, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvkelso/natural-earth-vector/master/geojson/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.geojson). The source dataset contains 177 countries. The task preparation splits data into three regional files: Europe (39 countries), Africa (51 countries), South America (13 countries), for a total of 103 features to be merged. The data is in WGS 84 / EPSG:4326 coordinate reference system and contains properties including NAME and CONTINENT. Expected output file location is /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/merged_countries.geojson with geometry types Polygon and MultiPolygon. Ground truth values are stored in /tmp/ground_truth_counts.json. Input files are prepared in /home/ga/GIS_Data/regions/.
